name: Pollo Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a stuffing by mixing the golden raisins, minced onion, cloves, cinnamon, salt, chimaja, and chopped spinach.
2. Stuff the chicken breasts with the mixture.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until tender. Baste with broth a couple of times during baking.
